name: Nöthin' but a Good Time: The Uncensored Story of '80s Hair Metal
original_name: Nöthin' but a Good Time: The Uncensored Story of '80s Hair Metal
overview: A fresh and shockingly candid behind-the-scenes look at one of music's most iconic eras. Each episode showcases the insanity and blazing ambition that has enthralled generations of music lovers and continues to influence culture to this day.
